description: Blueprint of UI tabs, paths, and admin sidebar control structures

tabs.plans: Manage Standard & Alliance Growth Network Plans
tabs.profits: Manual override for daily dividends payout rates
tabs.users: Inspect accounts, override balances, drill referrers
tabs.settings: System-wide branding and email SMTP fallbacks configuration
tabs.withdrawals: Approve, cancel, or reject pending customer payouts
tabs.fakeProfiles: Mock active profiles injector for public statistics
tabs.logicBuilder: Visual interface to edit variables, risk engines, and profit rules
tabs.novaPoints: Gamification store items and lucky spins editor
tabs.performance: Audits database connections, SMTP transports, and resets

tabs.overview: Display wallets, direct earnings, and Alliance position
tabs.investment: Configure active staking and view deposit histories
tabs.team: Referral dashboard and visual interactive Alliance Tree
tabs.challenges: Gamification check-ins, achievements, and shop rewards
